scripts.extensions:verify: npm run extensions:check && npm run extensions:typecheck && npm run extensions:test && npm run extensions:build
scripts.perf:core: npm run build -w zod-crud && node scripts/benchmark-core.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run verify && npm run standard:check && npm run perf:core && npm run pack:library
scripts.standard:check: node scripts/evaluate-standardization.mjs && npm test -w zod-crud -- standard-conformance
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke:package && npm run extensions:verify && npm run docs:evaluate && npm run playground:typecheck && npm run playground:test && npm run playground:build && npm run site:evaluate && npm run site:verify:pages && npm run browser:test
scripts.playground:typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/schema-form-lab && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/copy-review-lab && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/review-comments-lab && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/snippet-composer-lab && npm run typecheck -w @zod-crud/site
scripts.playground:test: npm test -w @zod-crud/outliner && npm test -w @zod-crud/mobile-cms && npm test -w @zod-crud/schema-form-lab && npm test -w @zod-crud/copy-review-lab && npm test -w @zod-crud/review-comments-lab && npm test -w @zod-crud/snippet-composer-lab && npm test -w @zod-crud/site
scripts.site:verify:pages: npm run site:build:pages && npm run site:evaluate:pages && npm run site:smoke:pages
